name: Qualtrics
description: Qualtrics experience management platform for employee and customer surveys

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Qualtrics
2. Go to Account Settings → Qualtrics IDs
3. Copy your API Token
4. Your datacenter ID is in your account URL (e.g. iad1.qualtrics.com → iad1)
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: Datacenter ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Qualtrics datacenter ID (e.g. iad1, fra1, syd1). Found in your account URL.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an API token in Qualtrics → Account Settings → Qualtrics IDs → API Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Qualtrics users to verify access is properly managed
